title: Foundation pattern manifest
description: Describes a foundational, framework-coupled pattern (trpc, better-auth, drizzle, …) so the create-stack CLI knows each foundation's footprint (files, deps, env, wiring) when forking a base app and stripping it down to the selected foundations.

framework.description: Framework the reference files target (e.g. 'tanstack-start'). The skill adapts route handlers for other frameworks.

detect.description: How to tell the pattern was opt-in in the target project. Matches if ANY dep is present OR ANY file exists.

dependsOn.description: Other pattern names this one HARD-requires. Vendored transitively even if not independently opt-in.

integratesWith.description: Other pattern names wired together IF also opt-in (soft). Absent → strip the integration.

capabilities.description: Swappable capabilities (add-capability) this pattern needs (e.g. better-auth → mailer, email-kit).

cleanup.description: Globs of CLI-generated example/boilerplate to remove when this pattern is set up.

files.description: Reference files to vendor. `from` is a path relative to the stack repo root, pointing into the base apps (apps/tanstack-base | apps/next-base) which hold the single source of truth for the code; `to` is the project destination ('<srcRoot>' = the project's source root).

wiring.description: Imperative wiring steps the skill performs after copying (e.g. append an export to a barrel).
